message:
beads: add TEST/ACCEPTANCE sections to all 242 open beads (Session 18)

Added UNIT TEST REQUIREMENTS, E2E TEST, and ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
sections to all 54 beads that were missing them, completing the
second-pass audit. All 242 open beads now have comprehensive
self-contained descriptions (~1 MB total content).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
